message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle rectangle
skinparam databaseStyle rectangle
skinparam interfaceStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam arrowThickness 1
skinparam arrowFontColor #000000
skinparam arrowFontName Arial
skinparam arrowFontSize 12
skinparam arrowFontStyle plain
skinparam arrowFontWeight normal
skinparam arrowTextAlignment center
skinparam arrowTextDecoration none
skinparam arrowTextTransform none
skinparam arrowTextWrap true
skinparam arrowTextOverflow ellipsis
skinparam arrowTextMaxWidth 200
skinparam arrowTextMinWidth 50
skinparam arrowTextLineHeight 1.2
skinparam arrowTextLetterSpacing 0
skinparam arrowTextWordSpacing 0
skinparam arrowTextIndent 0
skinparam arrowTextPadding 0
skinparam arrowTextMargin 0
skinparam arrowTextBorder 0
skinparam arrowTextBackground none
skinparam arrowTextShadow none
skinparam arrowTextOutline none
skinparam arrowTextUnderline none
skinparam arrowTextStrike none
skinparam arrowTextItalic false
skinparam arrowTextBold false
skinparam arrowTextUppercase false
skinparam arrowTextLowercase false
skinparam arrowTextCapitalize false
skinparam arrowTextSmallCaps false
skinparam arrowTextAllCaps false
skinparam arrowTextNoCaps false
skinparam arrowTextMixedCase false
skinparam arrowTextTitleCase false
skinparam arrowTextSentenceCase false
skinparam arrowTextStartCase false
skinparam arrowTextUpperCamelCase false
skinparam arrowTextLowerCamelCase false
skinparam arrowTextSnakeCase false
skinparam arrowTextKebabCase false
skinparam arrowTextPascalCase false
skinparam arrowTextCamelCase false
skinparam arrowTextConstantCase false
skinparam arrowTextVariableCase false
skinparam arrowTextFunctionCase false
skinparam arrowTextMethodCase false
skinparam arrowTextClassCase false
skinparam arrowTextInterfaceCase false
skinparam arrowTextEnumCase false
skinparam arrowTextStructCase false
skinparam arrowTextUnionCase false
skinparam arrowTextTypeCase false
skinparam arrowTextGenericCase false
skinparam arrowTextSpecificCase false
skinparam arrowTextAbstractCase false
skinparam arrowTextConcreteCase false
skinparam arrowTextStaticCase false
skinparam arrowTextDynamicCase false
skinparam arrowTextFinalCase false
skinparam arrowTextVolatileCase false
skinparam arrowTextTransientCase false
skinparam arrowTextSynchronizedCase false
skinparam arrowTextNativeCase false
skinparam arrowTextStrictfpCase false
skinparam arrowTextAssertCase false
skinparam arrowTextEnumCase false
skinparam arrowTextInterfaceCase false
skinparam arrowTextClassCase false
skinparam arrowTextMethodCase false
skinparam arrowTextFunctionCase false
skinparam arrowTextVariableCase false
skinparam arrowTextConstantCase false
skinparam arrowTextCamelCase false
skinparam arrowTextPascalCase false
skinparam arrowTextKebabCase false
skinparam arrowTextSnakeCase false
skinparam arrowTextLowerCamelCase false
skinparam arrowTextUpperCamelCase false
skinparam arrowTextStartCase false
skinparam arrowTextSentenceCase false
skinparam arrowTextTitleCase false
skinparam arrowTextMixedCase false
skinparam arrowTextNoCaps false
skinparam arrowTextAllCaps false
skinparam arrowTextSmallCaps false
skinparam arrowTextCapitalize false
skinparam arrowTextLowercase false
skinparam arrowTextUppercase false
skinparam arrowTextBold false
skinparam arrowTextItalic false
skinparam arrowTextStrike false
skinparam arrowTextUnderline false
skinparam arrowTextOutline false
skinparam arrowTextShadow false
skinparam arrowTextBackground none
skinparam arrowTextBorder 0
skinparam arrowTextPadding 0
skinparam arrowTextMargin 0
skinparam arrowTextIndent 0
skinparam arrowTextWordSpacing 0
skinparam arrowTextLetterSpacing 0
skinparam arrowTextLineHeight 1.2
skinparam arrowTextMinWidth 50
skinparam arrowTextMaxWidth 200
skinparam arrowTextOverflow ellipsis
skinparam arrowTextWrap true
skinparam arrowTextAlignment center
skinparam arrowTextDecoration none
skinparam arrowTextTransform none
skinparam arrowFontWeight normal
skinparam arrowFontStyle plain
skinparam arrowFontSize 12
skinparam arrowFontName Arial
skinparam arrowFontColor #000000
skinparam arrowThickness 1
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam interfaceStyle rectangle
skinparam databaseStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF

participant "finest level" as F
participant "intermediate level(s)" as I
participant "base level" as B

note over F: U(k,2) -> F(U(k,2))
F->F: SDC
note over F: U(k',2) -> F(U(k',2))
F->I: restrict
note over I: U(k,1) -> F(U(k,1))
I->I: FAS
note over I: tau = Q(1)*F(U(k,1)) - R*Q(2)*F(U(k',2))
I->I: SDC with FAS
note over I: U(k',1) -> F(U(k',1))
I->B: restrict
note over B: U(k,0) -> F(U(k,0))
B->B: FAS
note over B: tau = Q(0)*F(U(k,0)) - R*Q(1)*F(U(k',1))
B->B: SDC with FAS
note over B: U(k+,0) -> F(U(k+,0))
B->B: coarse correction
note over B: c(0) = U(k+,0) - R*U(k',1)
B->I: prolongate
I->I: correct
note over I: U(k'',1) = U(k',1) + P*c(0)
I->I: SDC
note over I: U(k+,1) -> F(U(k+,1))
I->I: coarse correction
note over I: c(1) = U(k+,1) - R*U(k',2)
I->F: prolongate
F->F: correct
note over F: U(k'',2) = U(k',2) + P*c(1)
F->F: SDC
note over F: U(k+,2) -> F(U(k+,2))

@enduml
